datasets.label: S&P Composite / S&P 500 long-history proxy
datasets.sourceName: Robert J. Shiller, Irrational Exuberance online data
datasets.notes: Uses the Data sheet Total Return Price column. Pre-1957 observations are a long-history U.S. equity market proxy, not the literal modern S&P 500.

datasets.label: S&P 500 recent price-return check
datasets.notes: Kept as an audit/source comparison file. FRED notes that the SP500 series contains 10 years of daily history and S&P reproduction restrictions.

datasets.label: MSCI World proxy - iShares Core MSCI World UCITS ETF
datasets.sourceName: Yahoo Finance chart data for IWDA.AS adjusted close
datasets.notes: Provisional ETF proxy for MSCI World, not official MSCI index data. Adjusted close includes fund-level effects such as TER, tracking difference, spreads, exchange listing, and any provider adjustments.

datasets.label: STOXX Europe 600 proxy - iShares STOXX Europe 600 UCITS ETF (DE)
datasets.sourceName: Yahoo Finance chart data for EXSA.DE adjusted close
datasets.notes: Provisional ETF proxy for STOXX Europe 600, not official STOXX index data. Adjusted close includes fund-level effects such as TER, tracking difference, spreads, exchange listing, and any provider adjustments.

datasets.label: FTSE All-World proxy - Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF
datasets.sourceName: Yahoo Finance chart data for VWCE.DE adjusted close
datasets.notes: Provisional ETF proxy for FTSE All-World, not official FTSE Russell index data. Shorter history because VWCE launched later.

plannedDatasets.label: STOXX Europe 600
plannedDatasets.status: Official index dataset still needs licensing/source decision; provisional ETF proxy imported.

plannedDatasets.label: MSCI World
plannedDatasets.status: Official index dataset still needs licensing/source decision; provisional ETF proxy imported.
